positive: A stylized, minimalist graphic design featuring a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The core elements are clean, silhouetted outlines of diverse nature motifs: glowing mushrooms, stylized ferns, gently falling bioluminescent spores, and meandering fairy lights connecting the plants. The composition should be centered and highly balanced, suitable for a single-color screen print on apparel. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette for the background feel, but keep the subject matter itself rendered in crisp, white negative space and varying shades of vibrant cyan/lime green for the glow effects. High contrast, vector art style, flat graphic design, highly detailed outlines, perfect for sublimation printing. Centered composition, full coverage.
